title: Better Create Glass Pipes
description: Make pipes from Create mod connected
body:
This is a simple texturepack that can make the mod create's glass fluid pipes connect

tips:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96c71aad6bd9214b9ff6035e70658ac278137698.png)
if your texturepack was marked red like this, don't worry because is normally and can run correctly
